note: Risky-3 — entirely fresh-init lineage (no resume from prior Risky). Trained from random N(0, 0.05) weights with pop 60, asymmetric +3.0/0.0/-1.0 scoring, max-sigma 0.5, quiescence ON, depth curriculum gen0:d3 → gen30:d4 → gen80:d5 → gen180:d6. Gen 250 is from the early d6 phase (70 gens after the d6 transition). Head-to-head vs the prior shipped Risky (gen 380 from the resumed Risky-2 lineage), 200 games d6 RO=8 seed=42: 37W/22L/141D = +15 tournament points. Gen 250 wins 63% of the 59 decisive games (29.5% decisive-rate, near the 30% Risky-style target). The fresh-init curriculum approach produced a meaningfully stronger Risky than 95+ generations of resume-from-prior runs ever managed.
